TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_nu_Choa-xian_a_micidekay_a_kungku, title = nu_Choa-xian_a_micidekay_a_kungku, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/nu_Choa-xian_a_micidekay_a_kungku} }

S.FORM: nu Choa-xian a micidekay a kungku kakiliman yadahay a micidekay a kungku i Choa-xian a micidekay a kungku atu i labuway a micidekay a kungku a nu tademaw sakatinengan adihen tu wayway nu bihid, lu, taw a sinciya i labu kuni natadengan. kyu i naayaway a kasumamadan nu Choa-xian a micidekay a kungku samalawpes sa. u sayaway a sinciya nu Choa-xian a micidekay a kungku ci Tan-cun-wang-ciyan, sakamu sa cinizaan tu misanga'an tu nu naayaway i kasumamadan a Choa-xian, sisa u sayaway a tademaw nu Choa-xian. kina kungkuwan caay kaw u tatenga'ay a laylay, ŤÄĆśėĮsisa ya u micidakay a kungku ku yadahay. naayaway a kasumamadan a micidakay a kungku malinga'tu i 1911 a mihcaan nu Choa-xian a kitakit, nu Tay-pay a sinciya nu misinciyaay ci Kui-yan-shou, Li-si mahida i micidekay a kungku nasulitan a sulit u huwan-tan-ku-ci. u nasasulitan tu sang-ku a hungti ci Huwan-yin a wawa nu Huwan-siyung mudebu, atu misanga'ay tu Tan-cun i naayaway a kasumamadan a tu micidakay a kungku. nilacul
S.PHON: nu ¶ńßoa-*ian a mi ¶id…ôkaj a kuŇčku kakir~…ĺiman jadańßaj a mi ¶id…ôkaj a kuŇčku i ¶ńßoa-*ian a mi ¶id…ôkaj a kuŇčku atu i r~…ĺabuwaj a mi ¶id…ôkaj a kuŇčku a nu tad…ômaw sakatin…ôŇčan adińß…ôn tu wajwaj nu bińßid, r~…ĺu, taw a sin ¶ija i r~…ĺabu kuni natad…ôŇčan. kju i naajawaj a kasumamadan nu ¶ńßoa-*ian a mi ¶id…ôkaj a kuŇčku samar~…ĺawp…ôs sa. u sajawaj a sin ¶ija nu ¶ńßoa-*ian a mi ¶id…ôkaj a kuŇčku ¶i tan- ¶un-waŇč- ¶ijan, sakamu sa ¶inizaan tu misaŇča Ē~ °an tu nu naajawaj i kasumamadan a ¶ńßoa-*ian, sisa u sajawaj a tad…ômaw nu ¶ńßoa-*ian. kina kuŇčkuwan ¶aaj kaw u tat…ôŇča Ē~ °aj a r~…ĺajr~…ĺaj, **sisa ja u mi ¶idakaj a kuŇčku ku jadańßaj. naajawaj a kasumamadan a mi ¶idakaj a kuŇčku mar~…ĺiŇča Ē~ °tu i **** a mińß ¶aan nu ¶ńßoa-*ian a kitakit, nu taj-paj a sin ¶ija nu misin ¶ijaaj ¶i kui-jan-sńßou, r~…ĺi-si mańßida i mi ¶id…ôkaj a kuŇčku nasur~…ĺitan a sur~…ĺit u ńßuwan-tan-ku- ¶i. u nasasur~…ĺitan tu saŇč-ku a ńßuŇčti ¶i ńßuwan-jin a wawa nu ńßuwan-sijuŇč mud…ôbu, atu misaŇča Ē~ °aj tu tan- ¶un i naajawaj a kasumamadan a tu mi ¶idakaj a kuŇčku. nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ
S.FORM: nu Choa-xian a micidekay a kungku kakiliman yadahay a micidekay a kungku i Choa-xian a micidekay a kungku atu i labuway a micidekay a kungku a nu tademaw sakatinengan adihen tu wayway nu bihid, lu, taw a sinciya i labu kuni natadengan. kyu i naayaway a kasumamadan nu Choa-xian a micidekay a kungku samalawpes sa. u sayaway a sinciya nu Choa-xian a micidekay a kungku ci Tan-cun-wang-ciyan, sakamu sa cinizaan tu misanga'an tu nu naayaway i kasumamadan a Choa-xian, sisa u sayaway a tademaw nu Choa-xian. kina kungkuwan caay kaw u tatenga'ay a laylay, ŤÄĆśėĮsisa ya u micidakay a kungku ku yadahay. naayaway a kasumamadan a micidakay a kungku malinga'tu i 1911 a mihcaan nu Choa-xian a kitakit, nu Tay-pay a sinciya nu misinciyaay ci Kui-yan-shou, Li-si mahida i micidekay a kungku nasulitan a sulit u huwan-tan-ku-ci. u nasasulitan tu sang-ku a hungti ci Huwan-yin a wawa nu Huwan-siyung mudebu, atu misanga'ay tu Tan-cun i naayaway a kasumamadan a tu micidakay a kungku. nilacul
S.PHON: nu ¶ńßoa-*ian a mi ¶id…ôkaj a kuŇčku kakir~…ĺiman jadańßaj a mi ¶id…ôkaj a kuŇčku i ¶ńßoa-*ian a mi ¶id…ôkaj a kuŇčku atu i r~…ĺabuwaj a mi ¶id…ôkaj a kuŇčku a nu tad…ômaw sakatin…ôŇčan adińß…ôn tu wajwaj nu bińßid, r~…ĺu, taw a sin ¶ija i r~…ĺabu kuni natad…ôŇčan. kju i naajawaj a kasumamadan nu ¶ńßoa-*ian a mi ¶id…ôkaj a kuŇčku samar~…ĺawp…ôs sa. u sajawaj a sin ¶ija nu ¶ńßoa-*ian a mi ¶id…ôkaj a kuŇčku ¶i tan- ¶un-waŇč- ¶ijan, sakamu sa ¶inizaan tu misaŇča Ē~ °an tu nu naajawaj i kasumamadan a ¶ńßoa-*ian, sisa u sajawaj a tad…ômaw nu ¶ńßoa-*ian. kina kuŇčkuwan ¶aaj kaw u tat…ôŇča Ē~ °aj a r~…ĺajr~…ĺaj, **sisa ja u mi ¶idakaj a kuŇčku ku jadańßaj. naajawaj a kasumamadan a mi ¶idakaj a kuŇčku mar~…ĺiŇča Ē~ °tu i **** a mińß ¶aan nu ¶ńßoa-*ian a kitakit, nu taj-paj a sin ¶ija nu misin ¶ijaaj ¶i kui-jan-sńßou, r~…ĺi-si mańßida i mi ¶id…ôkaj a kuŇčku nasur~…ĺitan a sur~…ĺit u ńßuwan-tan-ku- ¶i. u nasasur~…ĺitan tu saŇč-ku a ńßuŇčti ¶i ńßuwan-jin a wawa nu ńßuwan-sijuŇč mud…ôbu, atu misaŇča Ē~ °aj tu tan- ¶un i naajawaj a kasumamadan a tu mi ¶idakaj a kuŇčku. nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ
